---
title: "PhillyStat360 — 04d: Recalibration on a held-out fold (R port)"
output: html_document
---

R port of `code/python/04d_recalibration.ipynb`. Refits isotonic on a held-out
half of the test split.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libs}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(yardstick)
})

ROOT       <- here::here()
PY_PATH    <- file.path(ROOT, "data_py")
OUT_PATH   <- PY_PATH
GRAPH_PATH <- file.path(ROOT, "graphs", "python")
dir.create(GRAPH_PATH, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
SEED <- 42
```

## 1. Load predictions

```{r load}
preds <- read_csv(file.path(PY_PATH, "all_predictions_rf.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number)))
cat("Total parcels:", nrow(preds), "\n")
print(table(preds$data_split))
stopifnot(all(c("ensemble_prob_raw", "ensemble_prob", "ovs",
                "data_split") %in% names(preds)))
```

## 2. Split test into calibration and evaluation halves

```{r split-test}
set.seed(SEED)
test <- preds |> filter(data_split == "test") |> slice_sample(prop = 1)
half <- floor(nrow(test) / 2)
cal_set  <- test[1:half, ]
eval_set <- test[(half + 1):nrow(test), ]
cat(sprintf("Cal: %d (%.4f%%) | Eval: %d (%.4f%%)\n",
            nrow(cal_set), 100 * mean(cal_set$ovs),
            nrow(eval_set), 100 * mean(eval_set$ovs)))
```

## 3. Fit isotonic on calibration half

```{r fit-iso}
fit_isotonic <- function(x, y) {
  ord <- order(x)
  iso <- isoreg(x[ord], y[ord])
  approxfun(x[ord], iso$yf, rule = 2, ties = "ordered")
}

iso_v2 <- fit_isotonic(cal_set$ensemble_prob_raw, cal_set$ovs)
eval_set$ensemble_prob_v2 <- pmin(pmax(iso_v2(eval_set$ensemble_prob_raw), 0), 1)

eval_set |> select(ensemble_prob, ensemble_prob_v2) |>
  summarise(across(everything(),
                   list(mean = mean, sd = sd, min = min, max = max)))
```

## 4. Reliability curves

```{r reliability, fig.width=7, fig.height=6}
reliability <- function(probs, y, n_bins = 10) {
  bin <- ntile(probs, n_bins)
  tibble(probs = probs, y = y, bin = bin) |>
    group_by(bin) |>
    summarise(mean_prob = mean(probs),
              frac_pos  = mean(y),
              n         = n(),
              .groups   = "drop")
}

rel_old <- reliability(eval_set$ensemble_prob,    eval_set$ovs)
rel_new <- reliability(eval_set$ensemble_prob_v2, eval_set$ovs)

rel_combined <- bind_rows(
  rel_old |> mutate(version = "Original (test-fit)"),
  rel_new |> mutate(version = "Recalibrated (held-out)")
)

rel_p <- ggplot(rel_combined, aes(mean_prob, frac_pos, color = version)) +
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  geom_line() + geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Original (test-fit)" = "#d62728",
                                "Recalibrated (held-out)" = "#1f77b4")) +
  labs(title = "Reliability curve — eval half (equal-frequency bins)",
       x = "Mean predicted probability", y = "Observed vacancy rate") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "recalibration_reliability.png"),
       rel_p, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 200)
rel_p
```

## 5. Headline metrics

```{r metrics}
metrics_calc <- function(p, y) {
  list(
    auc = as.numeric(yardstick::roc_auc_vec(
      factor(y, levels = c(1, 0)), p, event_level = "first")),
    brier = mean((y - p)^2),
    mean_pred = mean(p),
    obs_rate = mean(y),
    ratio = mean(p) / mean(y)
  )
}

m_old <- metrics_calc(eval_set$ensemble_prob,    eval_set$ovs)
m_new <- metrics_calc(eval_set$ensemble_prob_v2, eval_set$ovs)

m <- bind_rows(
  c(version = "original",     m_old),
  c(version = "recalibrated", m_new)
)
print(m)
cat(sprintf("Mean-pred / obs ratio: %.2fx → %.2fx\n",
            m_old$ratio, m_new$ratio))
```

## 6. Apply to full population & export

```{r export}
preds$ensemble_prob_v2 <- pmin(pmax(iso_v2(preds$ensemble_prob_raw), 0), 1)

saveRDS(list(isotonic_v2 = iso_v2,
             fit_on = "random half of data_split=='test', seed=42",
             eval_metrics = list(original = m_old, recalibrated = m_new)),
        file.path(OUT_PATH, "calibrators_v2.rds"))

preds |> select(parcel_number, data_split, ovs,
                ensemble_prob_raw, ensemble_prob, ensemble_prob_v2) |>
  write_csv(file.path(OUT_PATH, "predictions_calibrated.csv"))
```
